title: Kuma’s Life as a Buccaneer
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Ivankov, Unknown person #6, Marines, Kuma as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Saint Garling scores a quick 10,000 points!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HELP M-....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: KyaH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is his strategy to target the high value rabbits?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Alright, it came off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a strong jaw!! No surprise for a shark fishman!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... thank you. I've never been praised like this...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tournament prizes are the key to our escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: THE PRIZES?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of them is in the strongest class of Devil Fruits! If you eat it, it'll allow you to transform into an AZURE Dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've also got the paw-paw fruit, which can be used to blast yourself and others to distant islands!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If any of us can eat one of those fruits,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ve will escape this hell and the navy's siege!! There are only a dozen of us, but we can do this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But it's impos- sible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The prizes are kept at the very center of the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a pro thief and wiretapper!! Two weeks back, I leaked all this info...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to the outside world!! I'm sure my message got someone's attention!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A plan like this needs plenty of decoys running around, after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I can help with that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kuma...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My size and bulkiness will help me survive longer than most!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd hate to see anyone here die when we attempt this.

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Hee-Haw!! Vell said, Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will not allow any of you to be killed!! VERE escaping GOD Valley together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What was that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is this the first I'm hearing of this?! What are they after?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back off, Stussy. You're only making a fool of yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THAT'S RICH COMING FROM YOU, GLORION!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is gonna be the decisive battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't rush ahead, rocks!! and since when did I say I'd let an idiot like you give me orders?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Newgate!! Not you too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Finders Keepers!! That sound good to the rest of ya?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It'll be all mine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would be pointless in your hands, Linlin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Off the East Coast....!! It's the Rocks Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why are they here...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's no time to worry about that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're being swarmed by notorious pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Give up, you lousy Marines!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Follow my lead, grew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: RARG!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That moron rocks is bound to lose sight of our main goal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who died and put you in charge?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We've gotta confirm it's here first!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna blow you all outta my way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll snatch it out from under all your pathetic noses!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: looks like Roger is on his way as well. He's the one person I--

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all have your heads in the clouds!! I'll be gone before you know it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: One thing at a time, rookie!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Today's the day we settle this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's right, don't forget it!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 52 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
